plans.name: Microsoft 365 Business Basic
plans.notes: Best for small teams needing core collaboration only.

plans.name: Microsoft 365 Business Standard
plans.notes: Adds desktop Office apps. Still limited security controls.

plans.name: Microsoft 365 Business Premium
plans.notes: Recommended security baseline for SMBs under 300 users.

plans.name: Microsoft 365 E3
plans.notes: Enterprise baseline. No seat limit. Windows SA rights included.

plans.name: Microsoft 365 E5
plans.notes: Maximum security posture. Recommended for regulated industries and large enterprises.

addons.name: Defender for Identity
addons.description: Detect & investigate AD/hybrid identity attacks, lateral movement

addons.name: Microsoft Sentinel (SIEM)
addons.description: Cloud-native SIEM/SOAR. Price per GB ingested (avg user ~2GB/mo)

addons.name: Purview Compliance Manager P2
addons.description: Advanced eDiscovery, Communication Compliance, Insider Risk Management

addons.name: Entra ID Governance
addons.description: Access reviews, entitlement management, lifecycle workflows

addons.name: Microsoft Copilot for M365
addons.description: AI assistant across Teams, Outlook, Word, Excel, PowerPoint

Exchange Online (50GB).description: 50 GB mailbox, custom domain, calendar sharing

Teams.description: Chat, meetings (up to 1000 users), file sharing, PSTN optional

SharePoint Online.description: 1 TB base + 10 GB per user, intranet, document management

Web Apps.description: Word, Excel, PowerPoint in browser (online only)

Desktop Apps.description: Full installable Office on up to 5 PC/Mac per user

Entra ID Plan 1.description: SSO, MFA, Conditional Access, SSPR, hybrid identity

Entra ID Plan 2.description: Plan 1 + Identity Protection (risk-based CA), PIM, access reviews

Defender for Business.description: Next-gen AV, EDR, attack surface reduction — optimized for SMB (<300 users)

Defender for Endpoint Plan 2.description: Enterprise EDR, threat & vulnerability management, automated IR

Defender for Identity.description: Detects lateral movement, pass-the-hash, DCSync attacks in AD/AAD

Information Protection.description: Sensitivity labels, DLP for email/files, Azure Information Protection P1

Microsoft Intune.description: MDM + MAM for Windows, macOS, iOS, Android — policy enforcement

Windows 11 Enterprise E3.description: OS upgrade rights, Universal Print, Credential Guard, AppLocker

Windows 11 Enterprise E5.description: E3 + Defender for Endpoint deep integration, WDAC

Purview Audit (Premium).description: 1-year audit log retention, high-value event access, forensic export

Microsoft Sentinel (basic).description: Included data connectors for M365 sources in Sentinel SIEM

Phone System.description: Cloud PBX capabilities in Teams (requires Calling Plan add-on for PSTN)
